ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the market data */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the market data */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the market data */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the market data */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the market data */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, option, currency) */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data feed provider */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score (out of 1.0) indicating the reliability of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, option, currency) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the financial instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument (e.g., technology, healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument (e.g., software, pharmaceuticals) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed provider */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Name of the data feed provider */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data feed (e.g., real-time, daily) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the data feed (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Coverage of the data feed (e.g., global, regional) */,
  "pricing" TEXT /* Pricing model of the data feed (e.g., subscription-based, pay-per-use) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., country, region) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard (e.g., grid, chart) */,
  "refresh_interval" INTEGER /* Refresh interval of the dashboard in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model used */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument being predicted */,
  "prediction" REAL /* Prediction made by the model */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the machine learning model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the machine learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the model parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument being monitored */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggered the alert (e.g., price above/below a certain threshold) */,
  "triggered_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
